examples.name: Simple output with two power supplies and no sub-supplies
examples.input:
Power                                             Fan      Inline
Supply  Model No          Type       Status       Sensor   Status
------  ----------------  ---------  -----------  -------  -------
PS1     PWR-C4KX-750AC-R  AC 750W    good         good     n.a.
PS2     PWR-C4KX-750AC-R  AC 750W    good         good     n.a.

examples.name: Output with sub-supplies, mixed statuses, and footer warning
examples.input:
Power                                             Fan      Inline
Supply  Model No          Type       Status       Sensor   Status
------  ----------------  ---------  -----------  -------  -------
PS1     PWR-C45-4200ACV   AC 4200W   good         good     good
PS1-1                         220V   good
PS1-2                         220V   good
PS2     PWR-C45-4200ACV   AC 4200W   err-disable  good     good
PS2-1                                off
PS2-2                         220V   good

*** Power Supplies of different type have been detected***
